name: Documentation Quality Check
description: Ensure public functions and classes have proper docstrings and documentation

on_failure.message: Public functions or classes are missing docstrings. Please add comprehensive documentation.
suggestions: Add docstrings to all public functions and classes
Include parameter descriptions and return types
Provide usage examples for complex functions
Document exceptions that may be raised

actions.command: python -c "import re; content = open('${TRIGGER_FILE}').read(); todos = re.findall(r'#\s*TODO:?\s*(.+)', content, re.IGNORECASE); fixmes = re.findall(r'#\s*FIXME:?\s*(.+)', content, re.IGNORECASE); if todos or fixmes: print('Code quality reminders found:'); [print(f'  TODO: {todo}') for todo in todos]; [print(f'  FIXME: {fixme}') for fixme in fixmes]"

on_success.message: Code quality reminders (TODO/FIXME) found. Consider addressing these before task completion.
